new_attractor: PAST_TRACE -> TEMPORAL_PROVENANCE -> TIME_BRIDGE_INDEX -> ORACLE_SIGNAL -> PRESENT_VERIFICATION -> FUTURE_POTENTIAL -> CONVERGENCE_DETECTOR -> QUARANTINE/ADOPTION
compressed_form: TRACE -> TAG -> SEPARATE -> TEST -> PROJECT -> CHECK CONVERGENCE
kernel_read: The system now tracks rare signals across time with explicit provenance, keeps past/present/future channels distinct, and only gives strong weight to anomalies that converge across multiple temporal layers.
live_signal: past trace present verification future potential convergence
surface_rule: keep past, present, and future channels distinct before weighting anomalies
